case_title: CAFE LILIANE VS SAN FRANCISCO RESTAURANT SUPPLY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CAFE LILIANE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RESTAURANT SUPPLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RESTAURANT SUPPLY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAFE LILIANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RESTAURANT SUPPLY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,533.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $105.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RESTAURANT SUPPLY
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RESTAURANT SUPPLY
